title: Argentinian Seitan Stew
description: A hearty and flavorful stew made with Argentinian seitan and a blend of spices, perfect for a cold evening.
instructions: Heat the vegetable broth in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the sliced onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the sliced red bell pepper and cook for an additional 5 minutes.
Add the Argentinian seitan, sweet potatoes, tomato paste, Worcestershire sauce, oregano, salt, and black pepper.
Stir to combine and bring the mixture to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20-25 minutes, or until the seitan and sweet potatoes are tender.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
